# le-bento-tile



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Overview

A single tile for use inside `le-bento-grid`.

Declares how many columns and rows it should span in the bento grid.
Visual appearance (border-radius, shadow) is controlled via CSS custom
properties so themes can override them.

## Properties

| Property | Attribute | Description                                   | Type     | Default |
| -------- | --------- | --------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------- |
| `cols`   | `cols`    | Number of grid columns this tile should span. | `number` | `1`     |
| `rows`   | `rows`    | Number of grid rows this tile should span.    | `number` | `1`     |


## Slots

| Slot | Description                       |
| ---- | --------------------------------- |
|      | Content displayed inside the tile |


## Shadow Parts

| Part     | Description |
| -------- | ----------- |
| `"tile"` |             |
